title: OrchestrationFlow
description: L3 — A runtime behaviour sequence: an ordered set of orchestration steps, kicked off by a trigger and owned by a service. Step membership is held as ordered step ids; the edges between steps and the rest of the graph are modelled as relationships.

trigger.description: What initiates the flow (e.g. the name of an Event or Command).

steps.description: Ordered OrchestrationStep ids that make up the flow.
